scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Multi-File Review with Cross-File Bugs
justification: All pass criteria met: JWT_SECRET undefined risk identified (severity High rather than Critical, but the risk description correctly captures the catastrophic failure mode including token bypass); unauthenticated location endpoint clearly identified as a privacy/safety issue; strong cross-file analysis noting the location endpoint lacks requireAuth used elsewhere; safe_to_deploy is false; both fixes are specific and actionable.

observations.text: Excellent cross-file analysis — identified both the missing auth on location endpoint and the IDOR on the authenticated endpoint
JWT_SECRET risk correctly described including the worst case of accepting any token, with a precise startup-validation fix
Added a bonus IDOR finding on the authenticated delivery endpoint that goes beyond the rubric expectations
Reproduction steps are concrete and actionable for all three critical findings
JWT_SECRET finding rated High instead of Critical — given the description acknowledges it could accept any token, this warrants Critical severity
Production readiness section is thorough, noting backward compatibility implications of adding auth checks
